title: Vulkanite Continued
description: Continuation of Vulkanite until they come back to it. Basically VulkanMod + Optimization mods that improve on it's performance + Axes are Weapons mod
body:
### ~~Continuation of Vulkanite until they come back to it.~~ **THEY ARE BACK UPDATING IT**
### Original: https://modrinth.com/modpack/vulkanite ### Original Desc # Vulkanite Vulkanite is a modpack based on the excellent mod Vulkan Renderer. The goal is to give the most performance and to have the best experience in Minecraft while staying close to Vanilla. # How does the modpack work? Using the Vulkan Renderer mod changes the rendering from OpenGL 3.3+ to Vulkan 1.3. This allows the average Minecraft player to play with a very high framerate while taking advantage of their own hardware. This modpack is approved by xCollateral, the developer of the mod at its core : Vulkan Renderer. This modpack should run on Windows without any problems and run on Linux pretty much equally good. This modpack doesn't work on Mac OS X.
